description_long: This is a two-story motel with a prominent front porch supported by white columns and a stone foundation. The exterior walls are clad in white siding, and the roof is composed of multiple intersecting gables with dark shingles. The front of the building features a wide staircase leading up to the porch, and a parking lot with marked spaces is directly adjacent, accommodating several vehicles. Visible windows and doors suggest multiple guest rooms, and the layout includes both private and communal spaces, such as a lobby or reception area. The rear and side elevations reveal additional entrances and a mix of window sizes, while the overall structure is rectangular with some extensions. The design is practical and welcoming, suitable for travelers seeking easy access and convenience.
description: A two-story white-sided motel with a stone foundation, dark gabled roof, and a wide front porch, directly adjacent to a parking lot. Multiple windows and doors indicate several guest rooms and communal areas.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance with a wide staircase, covered porch, and adjacent parking lot with cars.
description_view_1: Angled rear-side view highlighting the upper floor layout, visible guest rooms, and a secondary entrance.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the rear extensions, additional windows, and the full depth of the building.
description_view_3: Side view focusing on the parking lot, side entrance, and the arrangement of guest rooms along the building's length.
